title: mikania nummularia
intro: Mikania nummularia, also known as nummularia or guaco, is a plant species native to Central and South America that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, bronchitis, and asthma. The health benefits of Mikania nummularia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation, which can also help with stress and anxiety. Mikania nummularia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for different herbal preparations to be used depending on the desired effect and individual needs.
